svg.text: Multi-tenant utility intelligence & program evaluation · 13 screens · editable vector board for Figma
Import: drag this .svg onto a Figma canvas

g.text: Ingest, validate, evaluate, and explain energy-program
Data, prompts, and reports never cross workspaces.
Every metric traces to its source
Cites approved evidence, refuses the unsupported.
By continuing, you agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.
GridLens is invitation-only — ask a workspace admin.

svg.text: Multi-tenant picker · role differs per workspace

g.text: Pick a workspace to continue. Your role can differ in each one.
Invited by admin · expires in 5 days
Don't see your workspace? Ask a workspace admin to send you an invitation.

svg.text: Home · verified savings, data quality, recent evaluations

g.text: Why did verified savings drop in March 2026?
Verified savings fell about 18% in March, driven mainly by data
quarantine: the March meter upload had 1,902 duplicate readings
that were excluded before evaluation, cutting covered sites from
Milder weather than the 2024 baseline also lowered modeled
Can you estimate next quarter's savings for the HVAC program?
I can't project future savings — that isn't supported by approved
evidence. The latest HVAC evaluation covers Jan–Dec 2025.
Ask about your programs, data, or methodology…
Answers use only approved, tenant-scoped sources.

svg.text: Catalog list · type, processing, quality, records

g.text: Excludes sites with < 9 months of data
Usage spike to 4.2× expected at a single site
meter_readings v4 · meter M-2291 · detected Mar 18
weather_observations v3 · station GHCND · detected Mar 12
Bill amount variance 18% over prior period
